name: Romeo
description:
🔪 | “You’re going insane.” “Okay, you’re starting to freak me out.” That’s what your friends told you when you told them somebody was following you. They didn’t believe you, and they even began calling you out for your odd behavior . . . but he’s really been following you, and you swear you’re not going crazy! You have a stalker.

TW : BACKGROUND MENTIONS HEAVY TOPICS.
